summary: Iteration 49: Verified all 10 bingo teaser card requirements. Backend: 80 prompts, 124 bingo squares in DB, all bingo API endpoints working. Frontend: Compact teaser card shows countdown + teaser text + play now button (no grid preview). Modal opens with 5x5 grid, marking works, export button present.

issues: TEST_Trade_Record_3, TEST_Trade_Record_4, TEST_Trade_Record_5 visible in trending - these should be cleaned from database

passed_tests: 1. Bingo teaser card on Explore page: NO bingo grid preview shown, only countdown + teaser text + play now button - VERIFIED
2. Teaser card shows countdown text 'card locks in Xd Xh Xm · locks Sunday at midnight' - VERIFIED (showed '2d 6h 34m')
3. Teaser card shows italic text 'this week's card is live. how many can you check off?' - VERIFIED
4. 'play now 🐝' button is full-width amber color - VERIFIED
5. Clicking 'play now' opens the full bingo modal with 5x5 grid of squares - VERIFIED (25 squares)
6. Bingo modal allows marking squares (click a square, it becomes marked with amber background) - VERIFIED (2/25 → 3/25)
7. Bingo modal has 'save & share card' export button - VERIFIED
8. GET /api/bingo/current returns card with 25 grid squares, is_locked: false - VERIFIED
9. POST /api/bingo/mark with {index: 0} successfully marks a square - VERIFIED
10. Database has 80 prompts and 124 bingo squares - VERIFIED
action_items: Clean TEST_Trade_Record entries from database (visible in Trending section)
critical_code_review_comments: CollectorBingo.js properly redesigned: active state (lines 276-341) shows compact teaser with countdown, teaser text, and 'play now' button. No grid preview.
BingoModal component (lines 346-441) unchanged - properly shows full 5x5 grid with marking functionality
Backend bingo.py correctly returns 25-square grid with is_locked status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49: All bingo teaser card requirements verified. The CollectorBingo component now shows: 1) Compact teaser card with countdown 'card locks in Xd Xh Xm · locks Sunday at midnight', 2) Italic teaser text 'this week's card is live. how many can you check off?', 3) Full-width amber 'play now 🐝' button. Clicking the button opens modal with full 5x5 bingo grid. Marking squares works correctly. Database has 80 prompts and 124 bingo squares. Minor issue: TEST_Trade_Record entries visible in Trending section should be cleaned.
